steps.speaker: Phoenix
steps.text: My brain thinks you're going to have to pay the city for that pothole.

steps.speaker: Lucky
steps.text: I just escaped from my dad on Planet California. He's a high-ranking executive in The Vanguard. Wanted me to oppress people for a living.

steps.speaker: Phoenix
steps.text: I came here for college. The economy collapsed. Rent is too high. Now I'm permanently trapped in the Midwest.

steps.speaker: Phoenix
steps.text: My brain thinks we might be made of the exact same stuff.

steps.speaker: Lucky
steps.text: I want to make the loudest, most obnoxious noise possible until this whole empire gets a migraine.

steps.speaker: Phoenix
steps.text: We need a drummer. We should go to my place and figure this out. Head south through the alley.
